## 🌟Welcome to FMS Dental, Koti

During the early 1990s, dentistry in India was largely fragmented. Patients had to visit multiple clinics to consult different specialists and advanced dental procedures often required referral to hospitals due to the lack of dedicated infrastructure. Recognizing this **gap, the** **FMS Dental Group envisioned a revolutionary hospital-based, multi-speciality model** **—bringing all dental specialties under one roof. This vision took shape with the establishment of** **FMS Dental Koti in 1993** **, probably marking the inception of first** **multispecialty dental clinic in India**.

FMS Dental – Koti, has been recognized as Hyderabad’s first and most pioneering **hospital-based, multi-speciality dental clinic**. Spread across **10,500 sq. ft.**, FMS Dental Koti functions as a **full-fledged dental hospital**, equipped with a dedicated **Operation Theatre**, **ICU backup**, **sedation & general anaesthesia facilities** and **in-patient rooms**—making it one of the few centres in India capable of handling complex dental surgeries, facial trauma cases, full-mouth implant rehabilitations and medically sensitive treatments in a controlled, sterile environment.

Today, FMS Dental Koti is regarded as the **best dental clinic in Koti and surrounding areas** such as Abids, Himayath Nagar, Sultan Bazaar, Troop Bazaar, Narayanguda, Kacheguda, Nampally, Saidabad, and Chaderghat. Adding to its credibility, **FMS Dental Koti is empanelled with several major government and defence institutions**. It has been a trusted dental care partner for **Arogya Bhadrata, Arogya Shayata**, and various state government departments, as well as prominent central government organizations such as **NFC, NRSC, BDL** and others

The procedures are performed by **senior dentists with 20–30 years of experience**, covering all specialties including implants, orthodontics, pediatric dentistry, endodontics, cosmetic dentistry, oral and maxillofacial surgery and periodontics. The centre combines advanced digital technologies, laser dentistry and strict OHSAS-standard sterilization to deliver safe, precise and minimally invasive care.

In essence, FMS Dental Koti continues the legacy that began in the early 1990s—delivering comprehensive, ethical, and technologically advanced dentistry under one roof, for over **three decades**. Its reputation comes from offering **world-class dental expertise with warm, family-like care**, while keeping treatments affordable and accessible through transparent, customized plans.

## 📍 Is FMS Dental in Koti located along the main road for easy access?

FMS Dental – Koti is located on the lively **Koti Bank Street Main Road**, right opposite to the SBI (State Bank of India), and beside ENT Hospital, 100 meters away from **Koti Women’s College** and Andhra Bank, making it one of the most accessible dental centers in central Hyderabad. The area is well-connected through major roads, bus routes, and the metro network—making it easy for both local and outstation patients to reach.

If you’re coming by public transport, the **Koti Bus Stop** and **Mahatma Gandhi Bus Station (MGBS)** are within a short distance. For metro commuters, the **Osmania College Metro Station (Green Line)** is just a few minutes away. The clinic also provides **ample parking space**, ensuring a smooth experience for patients arriving by car.

Patients also receive practical guidance on brushing techniques, diet habits and overall oral hygiene—making it easier for children, adults and seniors to maintain strong, confident smiles throughout life.

## 🏗️ What advanced equipment does FMS Dental in Koti use for treatments?

The **infrastructure at FMS Dental Koti** is designed to offer comfort, precision, and hygiene at every step. Spread across **10,500 square feet**, the clinic houses **14 fully equipped dental operatories**, each designed ergonomically for patient comfort and doctor efficiency.

When you enter, you’ll be greeted by a **spacious, well-lit lounge**, soothing interiors, and a friendly team that ensures your visit is comfortable and stress-free. The clinics are equipped with **advanced digital X-ray systems** and **laser technology** for minimally invasive care.

**⚙️** **Technology that Powers Precision**

✅ **Digital Radiography (OPG, RVG, Cephalogram)** – Provides quick, high-clarity dental images with minimal radiation exposure.

✅ **Intraoral Scanners (iTero & 3Shape TRIOS)** – Capture accurate digital impressions for Invisalign and other aligners, eliminating the need for traditional messy impressions.

✅ **Advanced Laser Suites** – Diode lasers enable gentle, painless treatment for gum and other soft-tissue procedures.

✅ **Integrated CAD-CAM Support from the FMS Dental Lab** – Allows fabrication of precise, same-day crowns, bridges, and veneers.

✅ **International Sterilization Protocols** – OHSAS-compliant procedures with Class-B autoclaves ensure every treatment is safer, faster, and delivered with the highest level of hygiene and precision.

At FMS Dental, there’s no compromise on patient safety or comfort—every protocol, from sterilization to digital documentation, is handled with international precision.

## ₹ Does FMS Dental, Koti offer high-quality and budget-friendly dental treatments?

**Yes**, FMS Dental in Koti is widely recognized as one of the most **affordable and value-driven** dental clinics in and around Koti, Abids, Sultan Bazaar, Chaderghat, Kacheguda, Narayanguda, and nearby localities. The clinic follows a transparent, ethical and patient-first philosophy where every treatment plan is customized based on a patient’s dental needs and budget—without recommending unnecessary procedures. Senior dentists with decades of clinical experience provide **low-cost and economical, yet high-quality options** for all treatments, whether it’s fillings, root canals, crowns, braces, implants or smile makeovers.

Here are the indicative costs of a few dental treatments at **FMS Dental, Koti**:

## **Root Canal Treatment**

at FMS Koti typically starts from **₹5,500 onwards**. The exact cost depends on factors such as the severity of infection, number of canals involved, presence of infection in accessory canals and advanced protocols required for complete disinfection.

## **Zirconia Crown** prices

begin at **₹9,000 onwards** and may go up to ₹12,000 depending on the brand, whether it is monolithic or layered, and the level of shade customization needed to match natural teeth.

## **FMS SmartALIGN Clear Aligners**

start from **₹40,000**, while **Invisalign** cost ranges from **₹90,000 onwards**, depending on the complexity of tooth movement and treatment duration.

## **Dental Implants**

at FMS Koti starts at approximately **₹24,000**, with final pricing based on the implant brand, bone condition, and type of prosthesis needed.

Because the clinic is backed by the state-of-the-art **FMS CAD-CAM Dental Lab**, patients receive premium-quality crowns, bridges, aligners, and dentures at more affordable rates and with faster delivery times. Every patient receives printed cost estimates, clear explanations, and EMI options for major treatments—making advanced dentistry accessible to individuals, families, working professionals, and senior citizens.

In summary, **FMS Dental, Koti combines high clinical standards with pocket-friendly pricing**, ensuring that world-class dental care remains affordable for everyone in the region.

🌟Welcome to FMS Dental, Koti

During the early 1990s, dentistry in India was largely fragmented. Patients had to visit multiple clinics to consult different specialists and advanced dental procedures often required referral to hospitals due to the lack of dedicated infrastructure. Recognizing this gap, the FMS Dental Group envisioned a revolutionary hospital-based, multi-speciality model—bringing all dental specialties under one roof. This vision took shape with the establishment of FMS Dental Koti in 1993, probably marking the inception of first multispecialty dental clinic in India.

FMS Dental – Koti, has been recognized as Hyderabad’s first and most pioneering hospital-based, multi-speciality dental clinic. Spread across 10,500 sq. ft., FMS Dental Koti functions as a full-fledged dental hospital, equipped with a dedicated Operation Theatre, ICU backup, sedation & general anaesthesia facilities and in-patient rooms—making it one of the few centres in India capable of handling complex dental surgeries, facial trauma cases, full-mouth implant rehabilitations and medically sensitive treatments in a controlled, sterile environment.

Today, FMS Dental Koti is regarded as the best dental clinic in Koti and surrounding areas such as Abids, Himayath Nagar, Sultan Bazaar, Troop Bazaar, Narayanguda, Kacheguda, Nampally, Saidabad, and Chaderghat. Adding to its credibility, FMS Dental Koti is empanelled with several major government and defence institutions. It has been a trusted dental care partner for Arogya Bhadrata, Arogya Shayata, and various state government departments, as well as prominent central government organizations such as NFC, NRSC, BDL and others

The procedures are performed by senior dentists with 20–30 years of experience, covering all specialties including implants, orthodontics, pediatric dentistry, endodontics, cosmetic dentistry, oral and maxillofacial surgery and periodontics. The centre combines advanced digital technologies, laser dentistry and strict OHSAS-standard sterilization to deliver safe, precise and minimally invasive care.

In essence, FMS Dental Koti continues the legacy that began in the early 1990s—delivering comprehensive, ethical, and technologically advanced dentistry under one roof, for over three decades. Its reputation comes from offering world-class dental expertise with warm, family-like care, while keeping treatments affordable and accessible through transparent, customized plans.

📍 Is FMS Dental in Koti located along the main road for easy access?

FMS Dental – Koti is located on the lively Koti Bank Street Main Road, right opposite to the SBI (State Bank of India), and beside ENT Hospital, 100 meters away from Koti Women’s College and Andhra Bank, making it one of the most accessible dental centers in central Hyderabad. The area is well-connected through major roads, bus routes, and the metro network—making it easy for both local and outstation patients to reach.

If you’re coming by public transport, the Koti Bus Stop and Mahatma Gandhi Bus Station (MGBS) are within a short distance. For metro commuters, the Osmania College Metro Station (Green Line) is just a few minutes away. The clinic also provides ample parking space, ensuring a smooth experience for patients arriving by car.
